name: Crab Puff Savannah
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small skillet, melt 1 tablespoon of butter. Add red bell peppers, onions, and mushrooms. Saute until tender. Season with salt and pepper. Place in a large bowl and chill.
2. Clean spinach and remove stems. Blanch in boiling salted water for 2 minutes. Remove, plunge into cold water. Remove stems and squeeze out excess moisture. Chop spinach.
3. Mix spinach with ricotta cheese and parsley. Season with salt and pepper. Set aside.
4. Gently mix crab meat into the chilled vegetable mixture.
5. In a small bowl, beat eggs and mix with Swiss cheese. Gently fold into the crab mixture.
6. Prepare fillo pizza crust in a greased 9x13x2-inch baking pan. After the first 5 layers of Fillo sheets, spread half of the crab mixture over the Fillo. Top with 5 Fillo sheets and spread all of the spinach mixture on top. Layer with another 5 Fillo sheets, spread with the remaining crab mixture, and top with the last 5 Fillo sheets.
7. Brush with butter and score into Fillo sheets in a diamond shape. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 50-60 minutes or until puffed and golden brown.
